description: Automap cell type definitions mapping tiles to minimap graphics.

LevelName.description: Display name string key. Not read by 1.13c engine

TileName.description: Tile orientation type code (e.g. fl=floor, wl=wall left, co=corner)

Style.description: Visual style index for the automap tile. Not read by 1.13c engine

Type1.description: Primary automap cell type name. Not read by 1.13c engine

Cel1.description: Primary automap cell graphic index. Not read by 1.13c engine

Type2.description: Secondary automap cell type name. Not read by 1.13c engine

Cel2.description: Secondary automap cell graphic index (-1 = none). Not read by 1.13c engine

Cel3.description: Tertiary automap cell graphic index (-1 = none). Not read by 1.13c engine

Type4.description: Quaternary automap cell type name. Not read by 1.13c engine

Cel4.description: Quaternary automap cell graphic index (-1 = none). Not read by 1.13c engine
